security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Portable web stack for Windows (Nginx + MariaDB + PHP).
bundle.longDescription: MadiStack is a modern, open-source alternative to USBWebserver. A portable Windows application to download, configure and manage Nginx, MariaDB, PHP and phpMyAdmin — with built-in auto-updater.
